title: ASR Outdoor Gold Sluice Box Folding Aluminum Portable Gold Prospecting, 50 Inch

ASR Outdoor Gold Sluice Box Folding Aluminum Portable Gold Prospecting, 50 Inch

Pan for gold anywhere, anytime with the ASR Outdoor Backpack Folding Gold Sluice Box for gold prospecting. Extremely portable, folding down in size simply by loosening the connecting wing nuts, it will pack right up into your backpack. You're ready to prospect for gold right out of the package with woven vinyl miners moss included and installed.

Simplify your gold prospecting and mining with the ASR Outdoor Aluminum Folding Gold Sluice Box.

Key Features

  • PORTABLE DESIGN: Sluice Box folds down compact for easy storage and carrying. You can backpack this gold sluice box into remote areas or even carry it inside a 5 gallon bucket
  • EFFORTLESS USE: All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. When extended in stream, the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that it does not fold up and collapse without warning
  • HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: 18 gauge steel zinc-plated riffles are built in throughout the sediment channel trapping gold flake and small gold nuggets in the woven vinyl miners moss which is pre-installed and ready to use out of the box
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made to be used; designed to be portable; the backpack sluice box for gold panning is lightweight made from highly durable aluminum. It will surly withstand the harshest environments
  • SLUICE BOX SPECIFICATIONS: Extended Dimensions: 50" Length ; Folded Dimensions: 15" x 9" x 5" ; Wide-Mouth Flange: 13.25" ; Weight: 8.4lbs ; Comes with carpet, woven vinyl miners moss and shoulder strap

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROFASBS
  • UPC: 060886314820
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 50 in

This lightweight, aluminum folding sluice box incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out, with a large wide mouth flare opening. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket that is ideal for all day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding sluice into remote areas anywhere!

The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar cheaper models in that they would often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

The sluice box riffles feature Uni-Body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long, rust-free service.

Due to its simplicity and portability, this is a great gold recovery sluice box for beginners and serious prospecting enthusiasts alike!
